name: dv-utils

metadata.name: dv-utils
metadata.summary: Datavillage python utils for building algorithm running in confidential environment

documentation:
# Utility python library for interaction with datavillage gateway and components within the confidential environment

## About
This repository contains a set of utilities for the development of application within the confidential environment.

## Release process
The version management and git tagging must be done in accordance with the versioning practices described
in  [`dv-product` README](../dv-product/README.md#versioning-management).

## Deployment

## Code References

code references for this packages are generated with MkDocs and hosted on Github Pages for this repo:
https://datavillage-me.github.io/dv-utils/

modules.name: dv_utils.process
documentation: This module define a dummy event processor as an example.

functions.name: dv_utils.process.process_event_dummy
documentation: Process an incoming event

modules.name: dv_utils.client
documentation: This module define the client class to interact with the Datavillage API.

classes.name: dv_utils.client.Client

methods.name: dv_utils.client.Client.get_list_of_participants
documentation: Returns the participants as json

methods.name: dv_utils.client.Client.get_users
documentation: Returns the list of active users for this application

methods.name: dv_utils.client.Client.get_data
documentation:
Returns the available data for a given user.
If the format is turtle (default), the returned value is an rdflib graph.

methods.name: dv_utils.client.Client.write_results
documentation: Writes the results into the pod.

methods.name: dv_utils.client.Client.request
documentation:
wrapper of python requests to interact with the Data-village API

Args:
    path (str): api endpoint
    method (Literal[GET, POST, PUT, DELETE], optional): http method. Defaults to "GET".
    content_type (str, optional): requested content type. Defaults to None.
    data (dict, optional): data argument. Defaults to None.

Returns:
    _type_: _description_
Http client to interact with the Datavillage API.

methods.name: dv_utils.settings.Settings.load_settings
documentation:
load the settings from a file in argument, or in environment variable or default

Args:
    dotenv_file (str, optional): path to a dotenv file. Defaults to None.
Settings for the application

modules.name: dv_utils.redis
documentation: This module define the RedisQueue handling class

classes.name: dv_utils.redis.RedisQueue

methods.name: dv_utils.redis.RedisQueue.create_consummer_group
documentation: Create the consummer group if it does not exist

methods.name: dv_utils.redis.RedisQueue.destroy_consummer_group
documentation: Remove the consummer group if it exists

methods.name: dv_utils.redis.RedisQueue.publish
documentation:
publish an event to the redis queue

Args:
    data (dict): event data to publish
    create_consumer_group (bool, optional): create the consummer group if it does not exist. Defaults to True.
    stream_name (str, default=events): the stream_name to publish the events to

Returns:
    str: message id

methods.name: dv_utils.redis.RedisQueue.listen_once
documentation:
Listen to the redis queue until one message is obtained, or timeout is reached
\:param timeout: timeout delay in seconds
\:param stream_name: name of the stream to listen to
\:return: the received message, or None
Client to the local redis queue exposed in the cage.
